title: Delete stale dist-ts/ and ensure dist/, bin/*.js gitignored
description: dist-ts/ is a stale tsc output (not built by esbuild). dist/ contains 6MB of build artifacts that are committed but should be gitignored. bin/stdio-server.js (being deleted) but other bin/*.js should be ignored. Models/ dir (3.4MB HuggingFace cache) should be gitignored. Update .gitignore to add: dist-ts/, models/, bin/*.js (with bin/*.cjs, bin/*.mjs explicitly allowed).
validation: rm -rf dist-ts dist; update .gitignore; run `git status` to confirm dist/, dist-ts/, models/ are untracked.
